query:
ALTER TABLE runsheets 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS leadId INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS title VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS eventDate TIMESTAMP,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS venueName VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS spaceName VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS guestCount INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS eventType VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS publicToken VARCHAR(64);
